description_long: This snowman is constructed from three stacked, spherical snowballs of decreasing size from bottom to top, forming a classic snowman shape. Its face features two round black coal eyes, a pointed orange carrot nose, and a mouth made of small black coal pieces arranged in a smile. The torso is adorned with three large black coal buttons running vertically down the center. The arms are made from natural, slightly curved brown sticks, extending outward from the middle segment. The surface of the snowman is matte white, with subtle shading and texture to suggest packed snow. No headwear or additional accessories are present beyond the facial features and buttons.
description: A classic three-tiered snowman with coal eyes, a carrot nose, a coal mouth, stick arms, and coal buttons on a matte white snow body.
description_view_0: Front view showing the snowman's face with coal eyes, carrot nose, coal mouth, stick arms, and three coal buttons.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the protruding carrot nose, the profile of the coal buttons, and the curvature of the stick arms.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain snow surface with no facial features or buttons visible, only the stick arms extending outward.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the carrot nose in profile, the coal buttons along the side, and the stick arms' attachment.
attribute_limb_representation: stick arms extending outward from the middle segment
